overview: Life Admin Tracker is a professional, light-themed productivity web app that helps users manage and track important recurring life tasks — bill payments, document renewals, insurance, and deadlines — so nothing gets forgotten.
features: Task creation with title, due date, category, and description
Dashboard showing upcoming tasks sorted by urgency
Visual urgency indicators: overdue, due this week, upcoming
Task categories: Bills, Documents, Insurance, Healthcare, Other
Search and filter tasks by category
